# JSStaticFunction

**Structure**

A statically declared function property.

## Declaration

```swift
struct JSStaticFunction
```

## Creating a Static Function

- **init()**: Creates a static function.
- **init(name:callAsFunction:attributes:)**: Creates a static function with the specified values.

## Accessing Static Function Information

- **name**: A null-terminated UTF-8 string that contains the property’s name.
- **callAsFunction**: A callback to invoke when calling the property as a function.
- **attributes**: A set of property attributes to give to the property.

## Managing Class Information

- **parentClass**: A JavaScript class to set as the class’s parent class.
- **className**: A null-terminated UTF-8 string that contains the class’s name.
- **version**: The version of the class definition structure.
- **attributes**: A set of class attributes to give to the class.
- **staticValues**: An array that contains the class’s statically declared value properties.
- **JSStaticValue**: A statically declared value property.
- **staticFunctions**: An array that contains the class’s statically declared function properties.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
